reasoning: VIX at 20.09 is MID regime (normal), but direction is rising +2.71% (~0.5pt increase), signaling volatility creep. Overnight gap flat—no directional overnight sentiment. Critically, zero macro events today (no FOMC, CPI, NFP, earnings) creates a clear trading window. However, sector rotation is risk-on with all major sectors up (XLK, XLF, XLE, SPY all +0.3-0.6%); this contradicts the VIX rise and suggests the rally remains structurally intact but volatility is ticking up as a caution. Ribbon stack is BEAR at 52c spread, confirming technical bearish lean. The setup: bull tape with rising volatility often precedes consolidation or minor pullback before momentum resumes. Moderate confidence due to mixed signals—VIX rise is meaningful but modest (not >2pts), and the constructive tape limits downside bias.
